component.name: DataTableFilterPanel
component.description: Vertical filter panel for data tables with built-in checkbox, range, date, and custom filter types.

useCases: Filtering data table rows by category, amount, date, or numeric range
Side panel filter UI paired with DataTableToolbar
Multi-facet filtering with active filter counts
Custom filter UIs via render prop escape hatch

requiredProps.name: filters
requiredProps.description: Array of filter definitions with id, label, type, and type-specific options

requiredProps.name: values
requiredProps.description: Current filter state keyed by filter id

requiredProps.name: onValuesChange
requiredProps.description: Callback when any filter value changes

commonPatterns.name: checkbox-filter
commonPatterns.composition:
<DataTableFilterPanel
  filters={[{ id: "status", label: "Status", type: "checkbox-group", options: [{ value: "active", label: "Active" }, { value: "inactive", label: "Inactive" }] }]}
  values={filterValues}
  onValuesChange={setFilterValues}
/>

commonPatterns.name: searchable-checkbox-filter
commonPatterns.description: Checkbox group with search input for long option lists
commonPatterns.composition:
<DataTableFilterPanel
  filters={[{ id: "category", label: "Category", type: "checkbox-group-searchable", options: categories }]}
  values={filterValues}
  onValuesChange={setFilterValues}
/>

commonPatterns.name: amount-range-filter
commonPatterns.composition:
<DataTableFilterPanel
  filters={[{ id: "amount", label: "Amount", type: "amount-range" }]}
  values={filterValues}
  onValuesChange={setFilterValues}
/>

commonPatterns.name: combined-filters
commonPatterns.description: Multiple filter types in a single panel
commonPatterns.composition:
<DataTableFilterPanel
  filters={[
    { id: "status", label: "Status", type: "checkbox-group", options: statusOptions },
    { id: "amount", label: "Amount", type: "amount-range" },
    { id: "date", label: "Date", type: "date-range" },
    { id: "score", label: "Score", type: "range", min: 0, max: 100, step: 1 }
  ]}
  values={filterValues}
  onValuesChange={setFilterValues}
/>

antiPatterns.scenario: Using checkbox-group for lists with more than ~15 options without search
antiPatterns.reason: Long option lists become hard to scan without a search input
antiPatterns.alternative: Use checkbox-group-searchable for long option lists

antiPatterns.scenario: Placing the filter panel outside a flex/grid layout that controls its height
antiPatterns.reason: The panel uses flex-1 and overflow-y-auto internally and needs a constrained parent height to scroll
antiPatterns.alternative: Place inside a height-constrained container such as SidePanelContainer or a flex column

antiPatterns.scenario: Mutating the values object directly instead of passing a new reference
antiPatterns.reason: React will not detect changes if the same object reference is returned
antiPatterns.alternative: Always spread or create a new object when calling onValuesChange

filterTypes.description: Each FilterConfig.type selects the built-in renderer; custom uses a render prop

slots.filters: Array of FilterConfig objects rendered vertically with separators between them
slots.resetFooter: Built-in sticky footer with a Reset Filters button, disabled when no filters are active

parentConstraints: Requires a height-constrained parent to enable internal scrolling

interactions.checkboxToggle: Individual options toggled on/off; parent All checkbox supports indeterminate state
interactions.rangeInput: Amount range applies on blur or Enter; validates from <= to
interactions.sliderDrag: Dual-thumb slider for numeric ranges with linked number inputs
interactions.dateSelect: Popover calendar for selecting date ranges
interactions.reset: Reset button clears all filters to their default (all selected / empty) state

responsive.mobile: Typically rendered inside a Sheet or SidePanel which handles mobile layout
responsive.desktop: Renders as a scrollable vertical column at any width

accessibility.role: Generic div container; individual filters use Checkbox, Slider, and Calendar ARIA patterns
accessibility.keyboardSupport: Tab navigates between filter controls; Space toggles checkboxes; Enter applies range inputs
accessibility.screenReader: Labels associated via htmlFor on each checkbox; active count badges are visual-only
accessibility.focusManagement: No trap; focus flows naturally through filter controls

rules: checkbox-group filters default to all-selected; deselecting options constitutes an active filter
amount-range validates that from is not greater than to before applying
The countActiveFilters helper is exported separately for use in toolbar badges
FilterConfig, FilterOption, FilterValues, and AmountRangeValue types are exported for consumer use
Custom filter type requires both a render function and an isActive function to work correctly
alternatives: DropdownMenu with checkbox items for inline single-filter use

aiHints.context: Use as the filter sidebar for data tables. Pair with DataTableToolbar which provides the filter toggle button and active filter count badge. Place inside a SidePanelContainer or a height-constrained flex parent. Use countActiveFilters to compute the badge count.
